nasb.text: Therefore it is my judgment that we do not trouble those who are turning to God from among the Gentiles,

esv.text: Therefore my judgment is that we should not trouble those of the Gentiles who turn to God,

cnv.text: “所以我認為不可難為這些歸服　神的外族人，

ccb.text: “所以，我认为不应该为难那些信上帝的外族人。

csbs.text: 因此，我判定不可为难那些归向神的外邦人，
